'''''Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: Family Ties''''' was the seventh story-arc in the ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron]]'' comics, and the second of the "[[Rise of Isard]]" arc. It ran from [[January 7]] to [[February 4]], [[1998]].

==Plot summary==
After a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] victory at the [[Battle of Brentaal IV (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Brentaal IV]], defector [[Soontir Fel/Legends|Soontir Fel]] has joined [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]]. In return, the Rogues must return to Fel's home planet of [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] to find his wife. When the pilots reach the planet, they find that [[Syal Antilles Fel]] has fled. The remaining members of the Fel family approach the pilots to save another of their own. A young baby has been captured by a local crime boss in revenge for past wrongs. The Rogues must join forces with [[Corellian Security Force|CorSec]] operatives [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] and [[Iella Wessiri Antilles|Iella Wessiri]]. After rescuing the young boy, the Fels flee the planet with the Rogues. Horn escorts them out of the system, beating back a force of pirates.
